title: Scava exhibition at museum now features book readings and classic cars
description: GEORGE NEWS - The South Cape Association for...
bodyText:
Gallery

GEORGE NEWS - The South Cape Association for Visual Arts (Scava) current exhibition ‘n Blom in Elke Vrou blooms with yet another collaboration at the George Museum this month.


> On 21 December 2024 South African writers Estelle Brits and Julio Agrella will be treating book lovers to a reading from their books while surrounded by the wonderful art in the Sayers Auditorium.


The program begins from 10h30 with a reading by Estelle Brits from her book Die Lewe is ‘n Plek. At 12:00 Julio Agrella will be reading from his Zeus Van Wyngaardt series.

GALLERY - Scava-uitstalling by museum: 'n Blom in elke vrouJoin Scava for this exciting event and don’t miss out on the special exhibition of Rolls Royces and Bentleys as part of the SCOCC George Old Car Show from 13 December until 10 January 2025, as well as the annual Outeniqua Market which are both hosted at the George Museum.  All exhibited art is for sale.

The exhibition at George Museum runs until well into January.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
